heading: Frequently asked questions
subtitle: Everything you need to know before we get started.

items.question: What is n8n?
items.answer: n8n is a powerful workflow automation platform that connects your apps and APIs without locking you into a single vendor. It lets me build flexible, custom automations that you fully own, with no per-task pricing surprises.

items.question: Can you integrate my CRM?
items.answer: Almost certainly. I work with HubSpot, Pipedrive, Salesforce, Zoho, and many others. If your CRM has an API or webhooks, I can connect it and keep your data in sync automatically.

items.question: Can AI be included?
items.answer: Absolutely. I integrate models like OpenAI's GPT to qualify leads, draft replies, summarize data, and power chatbots, adding real intelligence to your workflows where it creates leverage.

items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: Most single automations are delivered within a few days. Larger, multi-workflow projects typically take one to three weeks depending on complexity and the number of integrations.

items.question: Do you provide support after delivery?
items.answer: Yes. Every project includes a support window, and I offer ongoing maintenance plans for monitoring, improvements, and adapting workflows as your business evolves.
